    • createAchDeposit

      public AchDepositsCreateAchDepositResponse createAchDeposit(String accountId, AchDepositCreate achDepositCreate) throws Exception
      Create ACH Deposit

      Creates an ACH deposit.

      Parameters:
      accountId - The account id.
      achDepositCreate - A deposit transfer using the ACH mechanism.
      Returns:
      The response from the API call
      Throws:
      Exception - if the API call fails

      Exception - if the API call fails
